name: Sour Fish Head Soup for One (Canh Chua Dau Ca
recipeIngredient: White part of 2 scallions, crushed with the side of a knife
1 large fish head or fish carcass, split down the center
1/4 fresh pineapple, cut in a lengthwise section and sliced
2 tablespoons mixed chopped fresh coriander (Chinese parsley) and green scallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the crushed scallions, black pepper, 1 teaspoon salt, and 6 teaspoons fish sauce over the fish head.
2. Allow to stand for 10 to 15 minutes.
3. Bring 1 quart of water to a boil and add the sour bamboo and pineapple slices.
4. Cook at a lively boil for 5 minutes.
5. Drop the fish head into the actively boiling water.
6. Keep at a boil, then add the remaining teaspoon salt and a dash of MSG.
7. Boil the fish head for a total of 10 minutes.
8. Transfer to a soup tureen, sprinkle with coriander and scallions, and serve.
